---
name: "Feature Request / Suggestion"
about: "Propose new content, a new reader-app feature, or a change you'd like."
title: "[Idea] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ["fluhartyml"]
---

## What were you trying to do

What were you reading, building, or looking up when you wished for something you didn't have?

## What would help

Describe the feature, the chapter that's missing, or the change — as concretely as you can.

## Alternatives you've considered

Any workarounds you're using today, or other designs you thought about.

## Chapter / page (if content-related)

If this is about the book, which page or topic. If it's about the reader app, skip this.

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, links, or anything else that makes the idea easier to picture.
